description: You are a high school automotive shop teacher at an OLPC-equipped school preparing a reference sheet on classic cars (1970-1982). Analyze the dataset at /home/ga/Documents/mpg.csv to identify the 5 cars with the highest horsepower (ignoring missing or '?' data) and the 5 cars with the highest mpg. Create a Sugar Write document saved as /home/ga/Documents/classic_cars_report.odt in ODT format. The document must include the exact heading "Top 5 Horsepower" followed by the corresponding car names, and the exact heading "Top 5 MPG" followed by those car names, using the exact names from the dataset.
